details.productUrlName: Living End JP Alternate Art Silver Scroll Foil

customAttributes.description:
Suspend 3—2BB
Each player exiles all creature cards from their graveyard, then sacrifices all creatures they control, then puts all cards they exiled this way onto the battlefield.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 4/24/2026. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText:
"Mortality is a gift. There is a comfort in knowing that the end is coming."
—Vess's Cautions in Necromancy
